data.title: Annual "Destination Professionals Day" on Feb 19, 2026, celebrated worldwide by Destinations International, representing CVBs.
data.description: International attention is being drawn to a special observance as events and initiatives are taking place in Potomac Falls, Virginia. Destinations International (DI), a prominent association for destination organizations and convention and visitors bureaus (CVBs), is recognizing this observance today, February 19, 2026. This acknowledgment is part of a series of events happening globally to highlight the significance of the observance.

data.title: Philanthropic partnership funds research in low-income countries to evaluate AI tools in health. 3 foundations involved.
data.description: Three prominent foundations – the Gates Foundation, Novo Nordisk Foundation, and Wellcome – are teaming up to fund evaluations of AI tools in low- and middle-income countries. The inaugural call for proposals is currently accepting submissions and is specifically looking for mature AI tools that could enhance health outcomes. This collaborative initiative aims to support locally driven efforts and foster advancements in the healthcare sector.

Here is the rephrased news information:A recent report indicates that the global economy is experiencing a decline, with the GDP growth rate projected to be 3.5% this year, lower than the previously estimated 3.7%. The decrease in growth is attributed to trade tensions between major economies and a slowdown in manufacturing. In addition, global trade is expected to expand by only 2.6% this year, down from the initial estimate of 3%. The report also highlights the impact of geopolitical uncertainties and policy challenges on economic growth around the world.

data.title: Blue Hat Interactive priced US$6.4M public offering of 32M Units at US$0.20 each, expecting gross proceeds of US$6.4M.
data.description: In Xiamen, China, on February 19, 2026, Blue Hat Interactive Entertainment Technology (NASDAQ: BHAT) revealed details about its underwritten public offering. The Offering consists of 32,000,000 Units priced at US$0.20 per Unit, leading to an expected gross income of about US$6.4 million for the Company, before accounting for underwriting deductions and other costs. Each Unit comprises one Ordinary Share valued at US$0.0000001 per share and one Warrant, with the latter being initially exercisable for one Ordinary Share.

data.title: Foundation for Drug-Free World distributes 1M booklets in Italy during Winter Olympics to combat drug abuse. #MilanoCortina2026
data.description: In Milan on February 19, 2026, the Foundation for a Drug-Free World achieved a significant milestone by distributing over 1,000,000 The Truth About Drugs booklets throughout Italy during the Milano Cortina 2026 Winter Olympics. data.title: Bimergen Energy Corp priced public offering at $4/share, raising $13.6M, with warrants included. Underwriters may purchase more shares.
data.description: On February 19, 2026, in Newport Beach, CA, Bimergen Energy Corporation, a leading utility-scale battery energy storage systems asset owner, disclosed a public offering of common stock and Pre-Funded Warrants at $4.00 each, generating $13,600,000 prior to deductions. Each unit includes one accompanying warrant, exercisable at $5.00 for a period of five years. Furthermore, the underwriters have an option to acquire an additional 510,000 shares of common stock and/or warrants within 45 days to cover over-allotments. The company trades on NYSE American under the tickers BESS and BESSWS.

data.title: Global nonprofit 50/50 Women on Boards opens 2026 Summit with The Breakfast of Corporate Champions to advocate for gender diversity in business governance. Founded by Janice Ellig in 2011.
data.description: In Los Angeles on February 19, 2026, 50/50 Women on Boards, a prominent nonprofit organization focused on advancing gender equality in corporate governance, disclosed its management of The Breakfast of Corporate Champions. This event, initiated in 2011 by Janice Ellig, the current CEO, aims to promote diversity on corporate boards.
